---
name: VOI library or method candidate
about: Propose a missing VOI/VOP tool, method, estimator, or related analysis
title: "[VOI census] "
labels: "research,triage"
assignees: ""
---

## Candidate

Give the method, estimator, library, tool, or application name.

## Authoritative evidence

Provide a primary paper, maintained registry record, source repository,
documentation, tests, vignette, or reproducible public behavior. Search-result
snippets and marketing claims are not sufficient.

## Proposed classification

- [ ] New estimand
- [ ] Estimator for an existing estimand
- [ ] Workflow or application
- [ ] Visualization or diagnostic
- [ ] Related analysis
- [ ] Alias of an existing method
- [ ] Unsure

## Decision boundary

Describe the alternatives, uncertainty, information action, utility or loss,
information cost, population, and time horizon. If these are absent, explain
why the candidate is still relevant to the information-design landscape.

## Software and rights

Record version/tag/commit, registry, repository, maintenance state, SPDX
license if known, and whether a legally reproducible fixture is available.

## Duplicate check

- [ ] I searched `specs/software-landscape/methods.json`.
- [ ] I searched `specs/software-landscape/registry.json`.
- [ ] I searched `specs/software-landscape/adjacent-method-dispositions.json`.
- [ ] I searched existing GitHub issues.

## Proposed VOIAGE disposition

State whether the capability should be native, equivalent, an adapter, planned,
excluded, or not reproducible, and why.
